zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Appleby於1350年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯文頓 維利亞時，她的父親Edmund De Appleby II28歲，母親Agnes De Solney25歲。她於1369年與William DeWinter在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Appleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Appleby was born in 1350, in Swindon Village, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund De Appleby II, was 28 and her mother, Agnes De Solney, was 25. She married William DeWinter in 1369, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1384, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

Elle a épousé William DeWinter en 1369, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1384, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Applebyが1350年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスウィンドン ヴィラッジで生まれた時，父Edmund De Appleby IIは28歳，母Agnes De Solneyは25歳であった。1369年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターでWilliam DeWinterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Appleby(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스윈던 비라지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund De Appleby II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De Solney(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 William DeWinter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Appleby родилась в 1350 г. в местности свиндон вилладж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund De Appleby II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Solney, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William DeWinter в 1369 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1384 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
